title: Tesla Vehicles Finally Come To Africa
description:
Tesla recently announced that the company’s vehicles will now be available in an African country for the first time ever. Starting in the middle of this year, the Model 3 and Y will be available in Morocco. Morocco was always going to be the first one, given its proximity to ... [continued]

The post Tesla Vehicles Finally Come To Africa appeared first on CleanTechnica.
